temporal_description: (00:00-00:08) In a dimly lit, crowded room, a man in a patterned shirt sits at a table, smoking a cigarette. He leans forward and whispers to a man in a black leather jacket, asking why he's so angry. The man in the leather jacket, who has a small, sharp earring, listens intently. In the background, another man in a floral shirt stands with his arms crossed, observing the conversation. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense, private conversation, establishing a conflict. The man in the patterned shirt is trying to understand the other's anger, hinting at a recent event involving 'Thais' in Longgu.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: The man in the patterned shirt speaks in a low, conspiratorial whisper. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, indistinct chatter from other people in the room.)
